categories.name: Backend Applications
categories.description: API and service starters for FastAPI and similar Python backends.
categories.details: Use when the deliverable is an HTTP API or background worker — FastAPI for async APIs with OpenAPI docs.

categories.name: CI
categories.details: GitHub Actions, Dependabot, and related repository workflows.

categories.name: Containers
categories.description: Docker and Compose packaging for the app.
categories.details: Add when you want container images and compose stacks for the API.

categories.name: Database
categories.details: Pair with the app when you need Postgres (or similar) locally/in compose.

categories.name: Editor
categories.details: Dev Containers and related IDE integrations.

categories.name: CLI Applications
categories.details: Use for Typer/Click CLIs and internal utilities shipped as entry points.

categories.name: Observability
categories.description: Error tracking, metrics, and tracing integrations.
categories.details: Add when you need production diagnostics such as Sentry.

categories.name: Security
categories.details: JWT/session auth skeletons and related security helpers.

categories.name: Monorepo
categories.description: Multi-package workspaces with shared tooling and one lockfile.
categories.details: Use when you need multiple libraries and apps in one repo — uv workspaces link members locally with a single virtual environment.

categories.name: AI/ML Applications
categories.description: FastAPI AI capabilities layered on backend starters.
categories.details: Chat, RAG, agents, MCP, and guardrails as extensions — not separate chat templates.

categories.name: MLOps
categories.description: MLOps framework starters and training/serving pipelines.
categories.details: CPU-first sklearn/pytorch/tensorflow topologies with MLflow-friendly defaults.

templates.name: FastAPI Starter
templates.description: Production-ready FastAPI API with feature-based layout, uv, Ruff, pytest, mypy, pyright, and pydantic-settings. The reference CPA backend template.

templates.name: CLI Starter
templates.description: Typer CLI with multi-command layout, uv, Ruff, pytest, and a console script entry point. Best for internal tools and shippable CLIs.

templates.name: Celery Worker
templates.description: Celery worker with modular tasks, Redis defaults, pydantic-settings, and eager-mode tests. Choose it for background jobs outside the HTTP process.

templates.name: Django API
templates.description: Django + DRF API with feature apps, OpenAPI-friendly health probes, uv, Ruff, and pytest-django. Use when you want Django's ORM and admin with a clean API layout.

templates.name: uv Workspace Starter
templates.description: Python monorepo using uv workspaces: shared packages/ libraries and apps/ deployables with one lockfile, Ruff, Pyright, and pytest.

templates.name: MLOps sklearn Starter
templates.description: CPU-first sklearn MLOps pipeline with YAML configs, step architecture, local MLflow, and offline tests. Pair with all-mlops-github-actions for CI/CT/CD.

extensions.name: GitHub Setup
extensions.description: GitHub Actions CI, MegaLinter, Danger PR review, todo-to-issue, Dependabot, and issue/PR templates. Use for any CPA template that lives on GitHub.

extensions.name: Development Container
extensions.description: VS Code Dev Container with Python 3.12 and uv for consistent editor environments across stacks.

extensions.name: Postgres
extensions.description: PostgreSQL 16 Compose service under docker/postgres/ plus env examples. Infra-only — does not write application ORM code.

extensions.name: FastAPI Docker
extensions.description: Dockerfile and Compose for FastAPI (uvicorn app.main:app). Reach for it when containerizing the FastAPI starter.

extensions.name: Django Docker
extensions.description: Dockerfile and Compose for Django (runserver / gunicorn config.wsgi). Use with django-api.

extensions.name: Celery Docker
extensions.description: Dockerfile and Compose for a Celery worker plus Redis broker. Pair with a reachable BROKER_URL (Compose sets redis://redis:6379/0).

extensions.name: FastAPI SQLAlchemy
extensions.description: SQLAlchemy 2.x session helpers and Alembic migrations for FastAPI (writes app/db/).

extensions.name: FastAPI Redis
extensions.description: Redis client helper under app/core plus a local Redis Compose service for FastAPI apps.

extensions.name: FastAPI Sentry
extensions.description: Sentry SDK helper for FastAPI with env-driven init (no-op without SENTRY_DSN).

extensions.name: FastAPI Auth JWT
extensions.description: JWT auth feature skeleton under app/features/auth for FastAPI starters.

extensions.name: Pre-commit
extensions.description: Local quality gates with Ruff, YAML validation, and whitespace checks for every CPA template.

extensions.name: FastAPI OpenTelemetry
extensions.description: OpenTelemetry tracing and logging hooks for FastAPI projects, useful for local debugging and observability setup.

extensions.name: FastAPI AI Chat
extensions.description: MVP /chat feature with mock LLM provider for FastAPI starters. No external API calls in default tests.

extensions.name: FastAPI AI Guardrails
extensions.description: Code-level input/output AI guardrails (length, blocked patterns, email redaction) without external moderation APIs.

extensions.name: MLOps GitHub Actions
extensions.description: CI, continuous training, model quality gate, and deploy workflow stubs for MLOps templates (CPU-first).
